# Arrivo Privacy Policy - Copilot Instructions

This is a static single-page website for the **Arrivo** Android app privacy policy.

## Project Details
- **Type:** Static HTML website
- **Hosting:** GitHub Pages
- **Framework:** None (pure HTML + CSS)
- **Entry point:** `index.html`

## Purpose
Provides a Google Play Store-compliant privacy policy for the Arrivo proximity-based arrival alert Android app.

## Rules
- Keep it pure HTML + CSS, no external dependencies
- All styles must be inline in the `<style>` tag inside `index.html`
- Max content width: 800px, centered
- Must be mobile-friendly and responsive
- Update "Last Updated" date when making content changes
